hero.title: Secure industrial operations with clear, risk-based decisions.
hero.subtitle: We translate fragmented technical findings into clear decisions for CISOs, COOs and plant managers — with deep OT expertise and Cyber Digital Twin capabilities.
hero.cta: Talk to an OT security expert

services.heading: OXOT services
services.intro: From first insight to sustainable management — a coherent path to make OT cyber risk manageable.

cta.title: Not sure where to start?
cta.body: Together we'll define the right first step for your organization.

items.name: OT Security Assessments
items.desc: Understand your current OT security posture, key risks and practical next steps.

items.name: Cyber Digital Twin
items.desc: Create a living model of your OT environment to support risk-based decisions at scale.

items.name: OT Security Programmes
items.desc: Design and execute structured OT security improvement programmes across sites, business units or regions.

items.name: Architecture & Segmentation
items.desc: Define secure OT network architectures, zones, conduits and practical segmentation patterns.

items.name: Secure Remote Access
items.desc: Reduce risk from vendor access, remote maintenance and external connectivity.

items.name: OT Security Baseline
items.desc: Define minimum security controls that are realistic, repeatable and aligned with operational needs.

items.name: Capability Transfer
items.desc: Help internal teams build the knowledge, structure and ownership needed to maintain OT security over time.

agent.title: Ask OXOT
agent.greeting: Hi — ask me anything about this page.

consent.title: Can we tailor this chat to your visit?
consent.body: We use first-party signals (pages viewed, clicks) only to make the assistant more helpful. Nothing is stored until you agree.

contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your OT environment, sites, and what you're trying to achieve.
contact.success: Thanks — your message reached us. An OXOT expert will be in touch shortly.
contact.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again, or email us directly.
contact.errorRate: Too many messages from this connection. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
contact.errEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
contact.errMessage: Please add a few sentences so we can help.
